title: Silly Stuffs
description: Become the greatest businessman in all of Minecraft! Expand your business empire, sell your products, mine plastic, eat burgers, and have fun!
body:
Silly Stuffs is
a capitalist chaos mod about business, bureaucracy, and questionable tactics.

Enter a reimagined Minecraft where the village economy spirals into corporate madness, questionable trades, and edible products that probably shouldn’t exist. Silly Stuffs turns your peaceful settlements into full-blown capitalist empires, complete with government workers, shady merchants, and plastic burgers served hot.



 Important Notes:
 Sodium recommended for smoother performance and fewer strange glitches.



 Best experienced in or near a village, where most mechanics shine.



 DO NOT enter the new dimension unprepared. Make sure to buy a return token. 



 Join the Discord for guides, help, and tips on how to survive your new corporate ecosystem.



With systems designed around village interaction, trade-based progression, and satire-rich mechanics, this mod transforms everyday Minecraft gameplay into a bizarre simulation of bureaucracy, exploitation, and "totally normal" corporate practices. Everything from your inventory to your morals will be tested.





 What’s Included:
Special Villager Professions — Turn items into profit with career-ready villagers.


 New Edible Items — Consume "foods" like yums!, GLITTER, WILD RED, and the infamous Plastic Burger. (We don’t recommend it.)


 Two Unique Weapons — For "defense"


 A New Dimension — A surreal realm full of strange fields and lakes. Warning: Don’t enter without a Return Token.


 Capitalist Progression — Engage in resource extraction, taxation, and Stuffs economies with the mod’s signature “business loop.”





A Final Disclaimer:
THIS MOD IS MEANT FOR FUN, JOKES, AND SATIRE.
It does not promote violence, substance use, or anything like that. It’s absurd on purpose. This is a chaos mod designed for laughs, not life lessons.
